name: Idea Validator
description: Fast first-pass validation of the MVP concept: value proposition clarity, target audience definition, and core assumption check.

checks.fail: ⚠️  No README.md — idea will be inferred from package.json

checks.prompt: Validate this MVP idea: (1) state the value proposition in one sentence, (2) define the primary user persona, (3) list 3 core assumptions being made, (4) give a viability score 1-5 with reasoning. Be concise and direct.
